title: Predict the Winner
hints: Consider the game as a series of decisions on a shrinking subarray. What determines the outcome of the current move?
Use dynamic programming or recursion with memoization. The state should represent the maximum score difference a player can achieve from a given subarray.
The base case is when the subarray has one element. For larger subarrays, the current player chooses the end that maximizes their advantage over the opponent's best response.
